name: local-ai-images
description: Local AI Images control panel and ComfyUI-backed machine-to-machine image-generation API for GPU Ubuntu hosts.

scripts.build: node --experimental-strip-types -e "console.log('No transpilation required: Node runs TypeScript via native type stripping.')"
scripts.typecheck: node --experimental-strip-types -e "console.log('Static type checking is optional; run tsc --noEmit if TypeScript is installed.')"
